title: The Passport (Eleventh Amendment) Rules, 1979 (03.09.1979)
text: REGISTERED NO. D(D)-72 The Gazette of India EXTRAORDINARY PART II—Section 3—Sub-Section (i) PUBLISHED BY AUTHORITY No. Z831 NEW DELHI,MONDSY, SEPTEMBER 3,1979/BHADRA 12,1901 S e p a r a t e paging is given to this Part in order that it may be filed as a separate compilation. 567 GI/79 (1149) -- 1 of 2 -- 1150 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART H—SEC. Jfi)] MINISTRY OF EXTERNAL AFFAIRS NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 3rd Sjptembjr, 1979 G-S.R.52?(E) In exercise of the powers conferred by section 24 of the Passports Act, 1967 (15 of 1967), the Central GovernmMt h :r^by mikos thj following rulos further to amend the Passports Rules, 1967, namely: — 1. (1) These rules may be called tho Passports (Eleventh Amendment) Rulos, 1979 (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 2. In Schedule I to the Passports Rules, 1967, after serial No. 19, tho following serial No. and the entries relating thereto shall be added, namely:— I "20 2 (a) Passport Officer, Jullundur (Pass- port & Emigration Offico, Jullun- dur) (b) Assistant Passport Officer, Ju- llundur (Passport & Emigration Office, Jullundur) (c) Public Relations Officer, Jullun- dur (Passport &, Emigration • Offico, Jullundur) (d) Superintendent, Jullundur (Pass- port & Emigration Office, Jullun- dur) J The districts of Jullundur, Kapur- thala, Hoshiarpur, Araritsar and Gurdaspur in the State of Punjab. -do- -do- -do- [No. VI/401/11/79] K. D. SHARMA, Jt. Secy. PRINTED BY THB MMUGBB, GOVT. OP INDIA PRESS, RING ROAD, NBW DELHI-110064 AND PUBLISHED BY THE CONTROLLER OP PUBLICATIONS, W5LH1-110054, 1 9 7 ? -- 2 of 2 --
